option.name: SCRIPT_TEXT
option.value: $ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"; $version = Read-Host "Release version, for example v1.0.0"; if ($version -notmatch "^v([0-9]+)\.([0-9]+)\.([0-9]+)(-[0-9A-Za-z.-]+)?$") { throw "Version must look like v1.0.0 or v1.0.0-beta.1, got: $version" }; $majorTag = "v$($Matches[1])"; function Run-Git([string[]]$ArgsList) { Write-Host "+ git $($ArgsList -join ' ')"; & git @ArgsList; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE } }; $status = git status --porcelain; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; if ($status) { git status --short; throw "Working tree is not clean. Commit or stash changes before releasing." }; $branch = git branch --show-current; if ($branch -ne "main") { throw "Release must be started from main. Current branch: $branch" }; Run-Git @("fetch", "origin", "main", "--tags"); $originMain = git rev-parse -q --verify "refs/remotes/origin/main" 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { $base = git merge-base HEAD origin/main; $remoteHead = git rev-parse origin/main; if ($base -ne $remoteHead) { throw "Local main is behind or diverged from origin/main. Run git pull --ff-only first." } }; $localTag = git rev-parse -q --verify "refs/tags/$version" 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { throw "Local tag already exists: $version" }; & git ls-remote --exit-code --tags origin "refs/tags/$version" *>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { throw "Remote tag already exists: $version" }; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 2) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; Write-Host "Release: $version"; Write-Host "Floating action tag: $majorTag"; Run-Git @("push", "origin", "HEAD:main"); Run-Git @("tag", "-a", $version, "-m", "Release $version", "HEAD"); Run-Git @("push", "origin", $version); Run-Git @("tag", "-f", "-a", $majorTag, "-m", "Release $version", "HEAD"); Run-Git @("push", "origin", "refs/tags/$majorTag", "--force"); Write-Host "Done."; Write-Host "GitHub Action reference: uses: Artasov/orcestr-repo-notifier@$majorTag"
